name: feedlog-deploy-test
description: Minimal Nuxt 4 + Postgres + better-auth starter for validating one-click deploy flows (Vercel / Cloudflare Workers / Docker).

POSTGRES.description: Hyperdrive config pointing at your Postgres. Provide your own Postgres or use [Neon](https://console.neon.tech/)'s free tier. Example connection string: `postgres://username:password@host:port/database`.

DATABASE_URL.description: Must point at the **same Postgres** connection string as the Hyperdrive binding above. Used during build time for db migrations

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description: Session / cookie encryption secret. **Required**. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32` or use this [online generator](https://numbergenerator.org/random-32-digit-hex-codes-generator).

SYSTEM_ADMIN_EMAILS.description: Comma-separated emails. **Required**. The first sign-up with a matching email is auto-promoted to admin. Example: `you@example.com`.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Optional. Google OAuth client ID. Create at [console.cloud.google.com](https://console.cloud.google.com/auth/clients/create) with redirect `{your-url}/api/auth/callback/google`.

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: Optional. GitHub OAuth client ID. Create at [github.com/settings/applications/new](https://github.com/settings/applications/new) with callback `{your-url}/api/auth/callback/github`.

AUTH_EMAIL_ENABLED.description: Optional. `true` / `false`. Default: enabled iff no OAuth is configured.

RESEND_API_KEY.description: Optional. When set, email verification auto-activates on signup. Get one at [resend.com/api-keys](https://resend.com/api-keys).

RESEND_FROM.description: Optional. From address for verification mails. Defaults to `onboarding@resend.dev`.

AUTH_EMAIL_VERIFICATION.description: Optional. `true` / `false`. Default: enabled iff email login is on and `RESEND_API_KEY` is set.
